svg.title: The public archive versus the locked door
svg.desc: Split illustration. Left panel: a stack of archived pages labeled across three decades, captioned "1 trillion+ pages preserved for 30 years." Right panel: a newspaper with redacted headlines and a red padlock, captioned "241 news sites blocking the crawler." A fractured dashed line divides the two panels.

text.style: font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 400;;fill:rgb(250, 249, 245);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Serif", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
